one_time_description: COVID-19 related funding received: $921,067 from Indigenous Services Canada and $44,610 from First Nations Health Authority
economic_notes: Government opened a cannabis retail operation during the year (not in compliance with Cannabis Act as of March 31, 2021). Owns 22% of River West Forest Products Ltd. (sawmill, inactive). 17% interest in Dandzen Development Limited Partnership (solar farm, 1MW solar PV plant). Acquired 65% of Elhdaqox Developments Ltd. (forestry rehabilitation contractor). Established Yunesit'in Leading Edge Limited Partnership to acquire operating assets from Leading Edge Wood Works Inc.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Net debt position of $702,021 at year end. Government was operating a cannabis retail operation without required provincial licence as at March 31, 2021 — contingent liabilities noted. Restricted cash balance not separately disclosed on face of statements; replacement reserve underfunded by $50,674. TCA net book value not extractable from provided text (Schedule 1 not fully reproduced). Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($4,200,767) + FNHA ($1,117,591) + Province of BC ($428,760) + CMHC subsidy ($41,227) + FNESG ($281,032) + BC Gaming ($376,736) + CCATEC ($141,000) = $6,587,113 but some may be non-government; conservative estimate used. Advance to related parties of $1,086,927 made to government business partnerships during year. Elhdaqox Developments Ltd. consolidated under modified equity method after ownership increased to 65% in 2021.
